scripts.dev: DAGSTER_HOME=$(pwd)/.dagster dotenv -e ../../.env -- uv run dg dev
scripts.build: echo 'No build step required for local python dev.'
scripts.lint: uv run ruff check src/ scripts/ tests/
scripts.format: uv run ruff format --check src/ scripts/ tests/
scripts.format:write: uv run ruff format src/ scripts/ tests/
scripts.lint:fix: uv run ruff check --fix src/ scripts/ tests/
